texto: Time isn't a commodity something you pass around like cake. Time is the substance of life. When anyone asks you to give your time they're really asking for a chunk of your life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Antoinette Bosco: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Time isn't a commodity something you pass around like cake. Time is the substance of life. When a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, one, day pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de day.
